title: obra/superpowers
summary: obra/superpowers 是一个智能体技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在通过子智能体驱动开发（subagent-driven development）提升开发效率。该项目结合了AI、头脑风暴、编码等主题，提供了一套系统化的技能和流程，帮助开发者更高效地构建软件。其高星数（259763）表明社区认可度极高，具有显著的技术价值和AI相关性。
summary_en: obra/superpowers is an agentic skills framework and software development methodology that works, leveraging subagent-driven development to enhance productivity. It integrates AI, brainstorming, coding, and SDLC, offering a systematic approach for efficient software building. With 259763 stars, it shows high community recognition and significant technical value and AI relevance.
